title: DirectX 3D Viewer
shortDescription: Open, inspect, and convert DirectX and common mesh formats with a native Windows desktop viewer.
fullDescription:
DirectX 3D Viewer is a native WinUI 3 and Direct3D desktop application for reviewing and converting 3D model files used in engineering and legacy content pipelines.

Supported import formats include .x, .hxx, .obj, and .stl. Use the interactive viewport to inspect geometry, rotate and zoom models, and validate model quality before sharing or export.

Designed for practical desktop workflows, the app keeps controls straightforward while providing fast startup and responsive rendering. Optional file associations let users open supported files directly from Windows Explorer.

DirectX 3D Viewer is ideal for developers, technical artists, and engineering users who need a focused Windows tool for day-to-day model inspection and conversion tasks.
features: Native Direct3D viewport for smooth model navigation
Convert and export across supported mesh formats
Optional file associations for quick Explorer launch
Clean WinUI 3 desktop interface with branded light and dark themes
whatsNew: Improved installer identity and signing, polished About branding orientation, and updated Store visual assets and listing package.
